prompt: A photorealistic medium close-up of two men standing shoulder to shoulder in a formal White House-style interior. On the left is a fantasy nobleman with long flowing platinum-white hair, pale skin, and an elegant high-collared white leather coat with subtle embroidered detailing and structured seams, resembling a Targaryen prince or medieval-fantasy royal adapted into modern photography. A few strands of his hair are blowing sideways as if caught by a gentle indoor draft. On the right is a middle-aged American politician in a dark navy suit, crisp white dress shirt, dark tie, and a small U.S. flag lapel pin. Both figures face the camera in a posed official-photo composition. The background is softly blurred and includes 1 framed portrait painting on the left wall, 2 warm table lamps, ornate cream-colored walls, and 1 American flag standing on the far right. Cinematic natural indoor lighting, shallow depth of field, muted neutral tones, highly realistic skin, fabric, and hair detail, serious formal mood, documentary press-photo aesthetic.
translatedPrompt: 一张写实风格的中景特写，两名男子在白宫风格的正式室内并肩站立。左侧是一位奇幻贵族，留着飘逸的铂金白长发，皮肤苍白，身穿优雅的高领白色皮质外套，带有精致的刺绣细节和结构化缝线，宛如现代摄影视角下的坦格利安王子或中世纪奇幻皇室成员。几缕发丝向侧面飘动，仿佛被室内微风吹拂。右侧是一位中年美国政客，身穿深海军蓝西装，搭配挺括的白衬衫、深色领带，佩戴着一枚小型美国国旗翻领别针。两人面向镜头，呈现出官方照片的构图。背景经过柔焦处理，包括左侧墙上的一幅肖像画、两盏暖色台灯、装饰华丽的奶油色墙壁，以及最右侧的一面美国国旗。电影级自然室内光效，浅景深，柔和的中性色调，皮肤、织物和发丝细节高度逼真，氛围严肃正式，具有纪录片新闻摄影的美感。

breakdown.creativeCore: 奇幻贵族与政客的肖像摄影：一张写实风格的政治肖像摄影，将白发奇幻皇室成员与身着西装的美国官员并列呈现，适用于讽刺作品、混搭创作或电影级社论图像。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 怀旧照片、纪实场景、人物生活方式、品牌氛围图

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 摄影/真实场景 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: close-up]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, cinematic, fantasy, documentary]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: shallow depth, depth of field, camera]。

Text requirements:
[是否含文字/精确文字/可读性要求]。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
